name: Management Agreement
description: Operations coordinates new-owner management agreement packets, signature readiness, onboarding handoff, renewal, and termination workflows with human approval before contract, owner, legal, money, or system action.

stages.name: Normalize Agreement Intake
stages.description: Normalize agreement type, owner, property, fee, and document facts.

steps.title: Normalize agreement facts
steps.instructions: Normalize owner, property list, agreement type, new/renewal/termination context, fee schedule, start date, termination date if any, required exhibits, bank/ACH status, insurance docs, signatures, and missing facts. Unknown legal terms, fee authority, signature authority, or termination obligations must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize management agreement facts and missing-data flags. No contract send, signature request, fee action, legal action, or system write.

steps.title: Check agreement ownership
steps.instructions: Check whether a human, attorney, broker, owner, or onboarding workflow already owns the agreement; review current draft, signature state, prior versions, and onboarding dependencies. Do not send or modify agreements.
steps.dispatch_body: Check agreement ownership, version, and dependency state. No external sends or system writes.

stages.name: Draft Agreement Packet
stages.description: Prepare draft agreement and handoff packets without sending or changing terms.

steps.title: Draft agreement packet
steps.instructions: Draft agreement-readiness packet with term checklist, missing exhibits, fee caveats, ACH/banking gaps, onboarding handoff, renewal or termination caveats, owner email draft, and legal-review flags. Draft-only; do not alter terms, send contracts, request signatures, or update systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft management agreement packet only. No contract sends, signature requests, fee actions, legal actions, or system writes.

steps.title: Review agreement packet
steps.instructions: Review terms, fee schedule, signature authority, legal sensitivity, onboarding dependencies, renewal/termination obligations, and missing documents before approval.
steps.human_prompt: Review management agreement packet before contract, owner, legal, fee, onboarding, or system action.

stages.name: Approve And Stage Agreement
stages.description: Human approval gates all agreement, signature, fee, and system actions.

steps.title: Approve agreement action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, reject, or route to counsel before any contract send, signature request, term change, fee schedule action, owner notice, renewal action, termination action, onboarding handoff, legal action, money action, or system write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before management-agreement contract, signature, fee, owner, legal, onboarding, money, or system action.

steps.title: Stage approved agreement package
steps.instructions: Stage approved agreement packet, owner draft, signature request metadata, onboarding/renewal/termination handoff, approval source, unresolved needs_verification fields, and next owner for human release. Do not send contracts, request signatures, change terms, charge fees, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved management agreement package for human release. No contract sends, signature requests, fee actions, or system writes.
